feedback.issue: connect() attaches a matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)') 'change' listener whenever no theme cookie exists yet. toggle() then writes the cookie (establishing an explicit preference) but never removes that listener. Within the same page session (no Turbo/full navigation to trigger disconnect+reconnect), if the OS theme subsequently changes, onSystemChange fires and unconditionally sets the class to media.matches, overriding the user's explicit toggle choice and contradicting the 'manual choice wins over system default' behavior. Fix: remove the listener in toggle() once a preference is stored (or have onSystemChange early-return when hasStoredPreference() is true).
